_comment: Visual parameters for the three network overlay types: signal relay, power feed, belt route. All tunables here — renderers and systems read from this config.

signal._comment: Thin emissive lines for information transmission between relays
signal._comment_factionColors: RGB [0-1] — player=#89d9ff, cultist=#ff8f8f, rogue=gray, feral=dim gray

power._comment: Medium emissive lines for power distribution from lightning rods
power._comment_color: Amber #f6c56a for active power, dim amber for unpowered

belt._comment: Chunky conveyor track for physical goods transport

junction._comment: Emissive circle at multi-network intersection points
junction._comment_dimWhenStructure: Junction brightness multiplier when a structure occupies the same tile

_comment_parallelOffset: World units perpendicular offset when multiple networks share a hex edge. Max 3 parallel networks per edge.
_comment_colorTransitionDuration: Seconds for network color to transition when territory changes faction
